action_choice_hints: Action cell is in the same row as a contiguous segment of moving tokens.
Action cell is the nearest unblocked cell in a given direction from a control token.
Action cell is within K steps of a static obstacle along a column.
Action cell is at the boundary of a region containing drawn traces.
Action cell is the first empty cell encountered when scanning from the top of a column.
Action cell is adjacent to a segment of static tokens.
Action cell is within a contiguous run of empty cells in its row.
Action cell is in a column containing at least one advance control token.
Action cell is blocked by an obstacle before reaching the bottom boundary.
Action cell is in a region where all cells below are empty up to the next obstacle.
Action cell is the only candidate in its row satisfying a proximity condition to a moving token.
Action cell is in a top band region with no drawn traces above it.
Action cell is the first cell after a drawn trace segment in a given direction.
Action cell is in a column where all cells above are empty until a static token.
Action cell is within a fixed distance from the left or right boundary.
Action cell is in a region where a moving token would land if dropped from above.
transition_hints: Selecting a cell containing a moving token causes that token to become a drawn trace at that location.
Selecting an empty cell in a column with a moving token above causes the moving token to advance downward to the selected cell.
Selecting a cell adjacent to a static obstacle prevents further movement of moving tokens past that point.
Selecting a cell in a column with no moving tokens above results in no change.
Selecting a cell at the bottom boundary causes a moving token to settle as a drawn trace.
Selecting a cell directly below a drawn trace does not affect the trace above.
Selecting a cell in a region with only static tokens does not alter those tokens.
Selecting a cell in a column with multiple moving tokens causes only the nearest one above to move.
Selecting a cell blocked by an obstacle above results in no movement.
Selecting a cell in a row with a control token may trigger a state change for that token.
Selecting a cell in a region with no empty cells above results in no movement.
Selecting a cell adjacent to a drawn trace does not extend the trace unless a moving token is present above.

diversity_requirements: Include templates that reference both row-wise and column-wise relations.
Ensure at least one template uses a nearest/first-encountered pattern in each direction.
placeholder_usage_limits: Limit templates with more than two free coordinate placeholders.
Restrict templates that use more than one region-based predicate.
avoidances: Avoid templates that only check for the presence of any token at (s, a) without relational context.
Avoid templates that match only on absolute coordinates or grid boundaries.
